title: SOL 10pk Kids Glitter Tubes in 10 Assorted Vibrant Colours - Fine Glitter for Arts and Crafts, Slime, Card Making, Nail Art, and Decorations - Easy-Pour Shaker Pots for Kids and Adults
features: 10 Vivid Colours – You will be spoilt for choice with this fine glitter set of diverse, vibrant and glimmering rainbow colours. We’ve carefully chosen every colour to create the ultimate glitter craft set experience.

Perfect For Arts and Crafts – Our craft glitter for kids and adults will get you stuck into craft making – decorations, greetings cards, customised clothes – there are so many opportunities with our glitter paint pots. It can also be used for colouring slime and sand at home or at school, glitter for wax melts, resin, or for your nail art.

Easy Pour Jars Packed with Glitter – Our 10 glitter shaker pots have been packed with up to 5 grams of coloured glitter materials in each tube. User-friendly shake and pour removable lids which will ensure you get the most out of each and every pot.

Endless Crafting Possibilities – These glitter tubes are safe and convenient to use by children and adults, whether it’s glitter for card making or slime making or for face and body makeup at festivals, parties, or for just looking great!

Diverse Rainbow Palette – Our 10 fine glittes are in assorted colours: Raspberry Red, Plum Purple, Chocolate Brown, Mauve, Orchid, Navy Blue, Sky Blue, White Gold, Midnight Green and Bright Silver glitter tubes.

These glitter tubes are perfect for decorating cards, enhancing resin projects, colouring slime, and adding sparkle to wax melts. You can also use them for nail art or festive face makeup. Are these glitter tubes safe for children to use? Yes, the glitter tubes are safe for both kids and adults, making them ideal for various crafting activities at home or school. Always supervise younger children during use. How much glitter is in each tube? Each of the 10 glitter shaker pots contains up to 5 grams of vibrant glitter. The tubes feature shake-and-pour lids for easy use and maximum control. What colours are included in this glitter set? This set offers a diverse rainbow palette, including Raspberry Red, Plum Purple, Chocolate Brown, Mauve, Orchid, Navy Blue, Sky Blue, White Gold, Midnight Green, and Bright Silver. Can the glitter be used for body and face makeup? Yes, this fine glitter can be used for body and face makeup, ideal for festivals, parties, or fun, creative looks. Just ensure it's applied with suitable adhesive for body use.
